# Description
A clear and concise description of the task, the problem being solved, or the feature being implemented. Include relevant context about which layer is affected and why this work is necessary.

# Guidelines
Technical guidelines, architectural constraints, and recommendations the implementer must follow. Reference existing patterns in the codebase where applicable (e.g. use `run_in_executor` for sync calls, follow the Zustand slice pattern, gate logic behind existing dependencies).
